headline: Michigan Set for Massive Battery Storage Buildout Under $1.6 Billion DTE Energy-LG Energy Solution Partnership

headline: LG Energy Solution and DTE Sign 6-GWh Michigan Battery Storage Deal

headline: Reported Earlier, DTE Energy And LG Energy Solution Vertech Announce 6GWh, 1.5GW Battery Energy Storage Supply Agreement Across Eight Michigan Projects
summary: The agreement is comprised of eight projects in the state of MichiganAll projects will meet domestic content requirementsLG Energy Solution to deliver 6GWh battery storage projects over a two-year period

headline: LG Energy Solution's shares surge as much as 16% after landing major U.S. battery storage deal
summary: The deal comes as the South Korean battery company expands its energy storage systems business in the U.S.
